title: Kendari Heat Wave
lead: Kendari is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.57. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kendari has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a critical level of severity. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.5 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing a significant impact on cooling demands. 
 The humidity level is at 74% and the wind speed is at 3.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
